title: Senior Doctor - Bayer India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Bayer India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Bayer India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!
